name: cbranch
description: A cross-platform, browser-based Git GUI (MIT). Monorepo root.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -b tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @cbranch/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @cbranch/rpc-contract typecheck:test && pnpm --filter @cbranch/core typecheck:test
scripts.gate: pnpm license-audit && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm depcheck
